title: WorkflowDraft 2.0
description: One actor's persistent editing draft of a workflow (editor plan §8.3). The server owns revision, validation state and the command set; the client never derives publishability. allowed_commands is already authorised for the requesting actor and follows AllowedCommand 2.0 — POST only, which is why save is POST .../save.

validation_status.description: Validation is synchronous; there is deliberately no 'validating' state.

validated_definition_hash.description: Definition hash of the last successful validation; null until one succeeds.

revision.description: The draft aggregate's expected version; every save/validate/publish/discard bumps it.

published_version.description: Set when status is published. May equal base_version: publishing an unchanged draft is a success that mints no new version.
